title: Lively Turkish Rice Wrap
description: A savory, kid-friendly Turkish wrap filled with aromatic rice, veggies, and lentils. Served in a soft corn husk, it offers a crunchy yet tender bite.

ingredients.name: corn husks
ingredients.notes: soak in warm water for 10 minutes

instructions: Rinse the rice under cold water until water runs clear.
Heat ghee in a saucepan over medium heat and add cumin, paprika, and coriander, cooking until fragrant.
Add chopped onions and carrots, sauté until softened.
Stir in rice, vegetable broth, and salt, bring to a boil then reduce heat, cover, and simmer for 18 minutes.
Fold in spinach, diced tomatoes, and cooked lentils, cover and cook for an additional 5 minutes until rice is tender.
While rice cooks, soak corn husks in warm water for 10 minutes to soften.
Remove the rice from heat, fluff with a fork, and let cool slightly.
Lay a corn husk flat, place a spoonful of rice mixture in the center, fold the sides, and roll tightly into a wrap.
Heat a nonstick pan over medium heat and lightly oil, then place each wrap seam side down and cook until golden brown, about 2 minutes per side.
Slice each wrap in half and serve warm.
